## Wave Summary

This wave updates `modules/MMM/00-app-description/MMM_app_description.md` Section 39A
(Build Lifecycle Stages) to reconcile the outdated MMM build sequence with the canonical
12-stage pre-build model defined in `governance/canon/PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL_CANON.md` v1.0.0.

**Delegated Agent**: governance-liaison-isms-agent

---

## Task Classification

| task_id | task_summary | iaa_trigger_category | qualifying |
|---------|-------------|----------------------|-----------|
| TASK-1266-A | Replace Section 39A numbered list with canonical 12-stage sequence from PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL_CANON.md; remove "Strategy" pre-step; add UX Workflow & Wiring Spec (Stage 2); rename Wave Plan → Implementation Plan (Stage 8); add Builder Checklist (Stage 9), IAA Pre-Brief (Stage 10), Builder Appointment (Stage 11); rename Build Waves → Build (Stage 12); remove post-build stages (Physical Verification, Deployment Wave, Commissioning/Activation); add cross-reference to canon; add note on platform merge gate enforcement; bump version v0.2.0 → v0.3.0 | PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL | **YES — QUALIFYING** |

## Required Phases (for Final Assurance Invocation)

When `governance-liaison-isms-agent` completes the work and CodexAdvisor invokes IAA for
the final assurance verdict, IAA will execute:

1. **Phase 1** — Identity & Preflight (always)
2. **Phase 2** — Alignment (PR classification, checklist load)
3. **Phase 3** — Assurance Work (all core invariants + PRE_BUILD_GATES overlay)
4. **Phase 4** — Merge Gate Parity, Verdict & Handover

---

## Required Evidence Artifacts

Before IAA issues the final ASSURANCE-TOKEN, the following artifacts MUST be present and verifiable:

| # | Artifact | Required By | Notes |
|---|----------|------------|-------|
| 1 | PREHANDOVER proof from `governance-liaison-isms-agent` | CORE-013, CORE-018, FAIL-ONLY-ONCE A-001 | Must follow §4.3b architecture: read-only post-commit, contains expected `iaa_audit_token` reference |
| 2 | `iaa_audit_token` field in PREHANDOVER proof | A-029, A-037 | Pre-populated with expected reference: `IAA-session-NNN-wave-1266-20260407-PASS` (NNN = actual session number at time of audit) |
| 3 | `## Ripple/Cross-Agent Assessment` section in PREHANDOVER proof | FAIL-ONLY-ONCE A-023 | Must explicitly declare NO DOWNSTREAM RIPPLE REQUIRED (with justification) OR list affected downstream files and agents. This was the failure mode in session-052 — must not recur. |
| 4 | Session memory from `governance-liaison-isms-agent` | CORE-018 (evidence bundle sweep) | Standard session output |
| 5 | This Pre-Brief artifact at `.agent-admin/assurance/iaa-prebrief-wave-1266-20260407.md` | OVL-PBG-004 | Pre-Brief must be committed before builder work proceeds |

## PREHANDOVER Proof Required Structure

The `governance-liaison-isms-agent` PREHANDOVER proof MUST include the following fields and sections:

```markdown
# governance-liaison-isms-agent PREHANDOVER Proof — Session NNN / Wave 1266

## Metadata
wave: wave-1266-mmm-39a-12stage-reconcile
issue: maturion-isms#1266
session_id: [session identifier]
agent: governance-liaison-isms-agent
date: YYYY-MM-DD
iaa_audit_token: IAA-session-NNN-wave-1266-20260407-PASS   ← pre-populate expected reference

## Changes Made
[List of specific changes to Section 39A]

## Verification
[Agent's self-check evidence]

## Ripple/Cross-Agent Assessment
[MANDATORY — per FAIL-ONLY-ONCE A-023]
[Declare: NO DOWNSTREAM RIPPLE REQUIRED because Section 39A defines the build lifecycle
stages narrative in the App Description only. The BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md already uses
the canonical 12-stage format (updated in wave align-12stage-prebuild-20260406). The canon
file PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL_CANON.md is not modified — only cross-referenced. No other agent
contracts, canon files, CI workflows, or module artifacts are touched.]
[OR: List downstream files requiring updates if this assessment changes.]
```

> ⚠️ **A-023 HARD REQUIREMENT**: The `## Ripple/Cross-Agent Assessment` section is NON-NEGOTIABLE.
> If absent from the PREHANDOVER proof → IAA will issue REJECTION-PACKAGE without exception.
> This was the root cause of the wave-1253 first-pass rejection (session-052). Do not repeat.

## Applicable Overlays — PRE_BUILD_GATES

IAA will apply all PRE_BUILD_GATES checks at final assurance time.

| Check ID | Check Name | What IAA Will Verify | Expected Outcome |
|----------|-----------|---------------------|-----------------|
| OVL-PBG-001 | module.manifest.json slug matches directory | `module_slug: "MMM"` in `modules/MMM/module.manifest.json` matches directory name `MMM`. Case-sensitive. | **EXPECTED PASS** — manifest confirms `module_slug: "MMM"` (verified at pre-brief time) |
| OVL-PBG-002 | BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER module identity consistent | `modules/MMM/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md` module name and slug match manifest | **EXPECTED PASS** — tracker references MMM (Maturity Model Management), corrected in wave align-12stage-prebuild-20260406. Note: tracker uses `module_slug: mmm` (lowercase) vs manifest `"MMM"` (uppercase) — IAA must verify both fields at audit time. |
| OVL-PBG-003 | Architecture doc references correct module name | `modules/MMM/02-architecture/architecture.md` uses "MMM" / "Maturity Model Management", not legacy "Risk Management" or "risk-management" | **FLAG FOR IAA VERIFICATION** — architecture folder exists (02-architecture); IAA must check for legacy name references at audit time |
| OVL-PBG-004 | IAA Pre-Brief exists before FRS wave builder delegation | Pre-Brief artifact at `.agent-admin/assurance/iaa-prebrief-wave-1266-20260407.md` | **PASS — this artifact satisfies OVL-PBG-004 for this wave** |
| OVL-PBG-005 | AGENT_HANDOVER_AUTOMATION version cited in knowledge files matches canonical | If PREHANDOVER proof or session memory references AGENT_HANDOVER_AUTOMATION.md, the version must match CANON_INVENTORY.json | **IAA will verify at audit time** |
| OVL-PBG-006 | BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER uses full 12-stage model | `modules/MMM/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md` contains all 12 canonical stages | **EXPECTED PASS** — tracker was updated to 12-stage format in wave align-12stage-prebuild-20260406 |
| OVL-PBG-007 | Architecture doc references full lifecycle sequence | `modules/MMM/02-architecture/architecture.md` lists all 12 stages | **FLAG FOR IAA VERIFICATION** — architecture doc content must be reviewed at audit time |
| OVL-PBG-008 | Stage gating respected (no skipped stages) | All prior stages complete (or CS2-approved exception) before advancing | **ADVISORY NOTE — see Scope Blockers** |
| OVL-PBG-009 | Legacy directory numbering flagged | No legacy directory numbers out of sync in BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER | **ADVISORY** — tracker uses `00-app-description` numbering; modules/MMM uses `00-`, `01-`, `02-` etc. This is a structural note per OVL-PBG-009 (advisory, not REJECTION-PACKAGE) |

## Scope Blockers

The following conditions will cause IAA to issue a REJECTION-PACKAGE or escalation regardless
of the quality of the primary Section 39A change:

| # | Scope Blocker | Trigger | IAA Response |
|---|--------------|---------|-------------|
| SB-001 | Files modified beyond declared scope | Any file other than `modules/MMM/00-app-description/MMM_app_description.md` modified in the PR | IAA must re-classify the PR. If additional files trigger new overlay categories (e.g., CANON_GOVERNANCE if canon file is modified), full additional overlay applies. |
| SB-002 | Section 39A content does not match PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL_CANON.md v1.0.0 verbatim sequence | Stage names or order deviate from canonical | REJECTION-PACKAGE — substantive alignment failure |
| SB-003 | BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER Stage 1 (App Description) status not COMPLETE | If this wave inadvertently modifies the tracker and breaks stage completion status | REJECTION-PACKAGE — stage regression |
| SB-004 | Missing cross-reference to PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL_CANON.md | Cross-reference declared in scope but absent from delivered content | REJECTION-PACKAGE — declared deliverable not present |
| SB-005 | No note on platform merge gate enforcement | Declared in scope but absent | REJECTION-PACKAGE — declared deliverable not present |
| SB-006 | Version not bumped from v0.2.0 to v0.3.0 | Document header still shows v0.2.0 | REJECTION-PACKAGE — version governance |
